headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen pulled off a stunning Bundesliga comeback when they twice fought back from a goal down as Victor Boniface netted a 93rd-minute winner in a 4-3 home victory over VfL Wolfsburg on Sunday.

video.headline: Leverkusen snatch win over Wolfsburg in 7-goal thriller

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayer Leverkusen vs. VfL Wolfsburg - Game Highlights) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: Deniz Undav scored a brace as a rampant VfB Stuttgart put on a spectacular display to shock Borussia Dortmund 5-1 at home on Sunday, handing Nuri Sahin's side their first defeat of the Bundesliga season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund fall to first league defeat in 5-1 hammering at Stuttgart

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfB Stuttgart vs. Borussia Dortmund - Game Highlights) 2024/09/22 ESHEET
